form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 4 of 7 runners at Pau January 30 over 4000m, on heavy track; 11 len behind Korral with 72kg at $4.70. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.8 len Bordeaux October 14 over 4200m slow track defeating Isisdelagarde with 69kg at $2.70. Expect a bold run.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last to post a big 5 len win. Mont-de-Marsan on March 12 over 4450m in the wet defeating Fosito Du Mont carrying 73kg at $1.40 in a steeplechase. Race before won by 9 len Pau on January 30 over 4000m on heavy going defeating Jamailya with 72kg at $1.70 in a steeplechase. Capable of a strong show here.

form.formComment: Resuming today after three months. Finished off last preparation 2 in a small field at Pau January 11 over 3900m, on rain affected going; 1.75 len behind Forest Du Pecos with 66kg at $2.80. First up last campaign 6 of 8 starters at this track March 19 2025 over 3500m, slow track; 51 len behind Forest Du Pecos with 63kg at $27. Definite winning chance first up.

form.formComment: Useful type. Comes off a 36 day let-up. Last outing finished second of 10 starters at this track on March 1 over 3500m, 1.3 len behind Kheops De Buj with 76kg at $5.60. Run before settled back and ran on when finished eighth of 11 runners at Pau on February 8 over 3800m, in the wet; 45 len behind Le Lascar carrying 65.5kg at $20. Gets a chance to win. Take seriously.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Pompadour August 2 over 4200m, 46 len behind Kalki De Lagarde with 65.5kg. Previously first up; 4 in a small field at Pompadour July 13 over 3900m, 32 len behind Lora De La Brunie with 72kg. Needs it easier.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth of 9 runners at Mont-de-Marsan on March 12 over 4450m, in the wet; 18 len behind Korral with 68kg at $16. Race before finished fourth of 8 runners at Pau on January 9 over 4700m, on a wet track; 48 len behind Isisdelagarde carrying 64kg at $28. Has the ability to be in the finish. Top chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after a about 18 months break. Finished off last campaign 4 in a small field at Cluny October 5 2024 over 4600m, slow track; 40 len behind Joy De Balme carrying 62kg. When resuming last campaign ran last in a small field at this track September 18 2024 over 3500m, slow track; 46 len behind Kobe De La Brunie with 64kg at $18. This looks too tough.
